summary: Iteration 248 - Kinetic Dock & Sovereign Treasury Testing Complete. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All SmartDock Kinetic Architecture features verified - opaque background (rgba 0.88), data-orientation/data-snapped attributes, drag handle title. Orbital Mixer Playground mode working with class picker and constellation panel. Sovereign Dashboard at /sovereign-admin fully functional with all 5 tabs.
critical_code_review_comments: SmartDock.js line 444: Background correctly set to 'rgba(10,10,18,0.88)' - opaque without backdrop-filter blur
SmartDock.js line 395-396: data-orientation and data-snapped attributes properly set on dock container
SmartDock.js line 469: Drag handle title correctly set to 'Drag to reposition (double-tap to collapse)'
SmartDock.js line 139-186: Magnetic edge snapping with 20px MAGNETIC_ZONE working correctly
SmartDock.js line 267-285: Double-tap collapse detection (350ms threshold) implemented
SovereignDashboard.js: All 5 tabs (Overview, Controls, Mirror, Escrow, Export) working with proper data-testid attributes
treasury.py: All sovereign config CRUD endpoints working - fee_percent validation (0-50), toggle updates, skeleton export
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 248 verified all Kinetic Dock features: (1) SmartDock opaque background rgba(10,10,18,0.88) confirmed. (2) data-orientation='horizontal' and data-snapped='none' attributes present. (3) Drag handle title 'Drag to reposition (double-tap to collapse)' verified. (4) Orbital Mixer Playground mode renders with orbital ring, frequency modules, class picker ('Choose Class' button), and constellation panel ('Recipes' button with 100 credits balance). (5) Sovereign Dashboard at /sovereign-admin has 5 tabs: Overview (stats grid), Controls (fee slider 0-25%, toggles), Mirror, Escrow, Export. (6) Backend APIs all working: GET/PATCH /api/treasury/sovereign/config, GET /api/treasury/skeleton/export, GET /api/treasury/sovereign/mirror, GET /api/treasury/sovereign/escrow.

backend_sovereign_config_get.details: GET /api/treasury/sovereign/config returns fee_percent, is_live, mirror_active, frozen_transactions

backend_sovereign_config_patch.details: PATCH /api/treasury/sovereign/config updates fee_percent dynamically and persists

backend_sovereign_config_validation.details: Fee validation rejects > 50 and < 0 with 400 status

backend_skeleton_export.details: GET /api/treasury/skeleton/export returns framework, skeleton (module_types, affinity_tags, tier_levels, interaction_model, monetization), class_archetypes

backend_sovereign_mirror.details: GET /api/treasury/sovereign/mirror returns entries list with total count

frontend_smartdock_opaque_background.details: SmartDock pill background is rgba(10,10,18,0.88) - opaque without backdrop-filter

frontend_smartdock_data_attributes.details: data-orientation='horizontal' and data-snapped='none' attributes present on SmartDock

frontend_smartdock_drag_handle_title.details: Drag handle has title 'Drag to reposition (double-tap to collapse)'

frontend_orbital_mixer_playground.details: Playground mode renders with orbital ring, frequency modules (528Hz, 432Hz, etc.), and instrument modules

frontend_class_picker.details: Class picker ('Choose Class' button) visible in Orbital Mixer, shows 'Shaman' class

frontend_constellation_panel.details: Constellation panel ('Recipes' button) opens with 100 credits balance, tabs: Save, Mine, Community, Market

frontend_sovereign_overview_tab.details: Overview tab shows stats grid: Treasury, Fees Collected, Wallets, Escrow + Platform Status

frontend_sovereign_controls_tab.details: Controls tab shows fee slider (5%), System Live toggle, Mirror Hook toggle, Freeze All Trades toggle
